hooks.command: if [ -d .git ]; then current=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$current" != "main" ]; then echo "[session-start] HEAD was on '$current', forcing checkout to main" >&2; git fetch origin main --depth=1 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git checkout main >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git pull --ff-only origin main >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo "[session-start] now on $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)" >&2; fi; fi
